dict.string: Configures DDM OS Reminder message preferences
Mac Admins’ new favorite, MDM-agnostic, “set-it-and-forget-it” end-user messaging for Apple’s Declarative Device Management-enforced macOS update deadlines
A unique identifier for the payload, dot-delimited. Usually root PayloadIdentifier+subidentifier.
A reverse-DNS-style identifier for the specific payload. It is usually the same identifier as the root-level PayloadIdentifier value with an additional component appended.
The type of the payload, a reverse DNS string.
A globally unique identifier for the payload. The actual content is unimportant, but it must be globally unique.
The version of the whole configuration profile.
The version number of the individual payload.
This value describes the issuing organization of the profile, as displayed to the user.
Path to the log file for the DDM reminder script.
Number of days before the deadline when reminders start being displayed.
Number of days before the deadline when blur-screen enforcement starts.
Number of days before the deadline when the secondary button is hidden.
Days Before Deadline: Hide Defer Button
Number of days of excessive uptime before warning the user.
Number of days past deadline before activating restart workflow behavior.
Controls restart workflow behavior after deadline. Valid values: Off | Prompt | Force.
Percent of free disk space required before warning the user.
Delay in minutes before enforcing reminders around meetings.
Space-delimited list of application name substrings used to allowlist display sleep assertions; matching assertions defer reminders up to the Meeting Delay.
URL to the organization overlay icon image.
URL to the organization overlay icon image used when the interface is in Dark Mode. Falls back to OrganizationOverlayIconURL when unset.
Whether to swap the overlay icon and primary logo positions.
strftime format string used to render the deadline date for users.
Forces a specific language for the reminder dialog. Set to 'auto' to match the system locale.
Display name of the support team.
URL opened when the info button is clicked.
Markdown-formatted link to the support knowledge base article.
For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom right-hand corner.
Optional support sentence appended to message body.
For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom, right-hand corner.
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
Bei Fragen wenden Sie sich ueber die (?) Schaltflaeche unten rechts an **{supportTeamName}**.
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
Pour obtenir de l'aide, contactez **{supportTeamName}** via le bouton (?) en bas a droite.
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Para obtener ayuda, contacte con **{supportTeamName}** haciendo clic en el botón (?) de la esquina inferior derecha.
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
Para obter assistência, contacte a equipa **{supportTeamName}** clicando no botão (?) no canto inferior direito.
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
サポートが必要な場合は、右下の (?) ボタンをクリックして **{supportTeamName}** にお問い合わせください。
Overrides SupportAssistanceMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Title text displayed at the top of the DDM dialog.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'en'.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'de'.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'es'.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'pt'.
Overrides Title when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Label for the primary action button.
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'en'.
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'de'.
Ouvrir Mise a jour de logiciels
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'es'.
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'pt'.
ソフトウェア・アップデートを開く
Overrides Button1Text when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Label for the secondary (remind later) button.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'en'.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'de'.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'es'.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'pt'.
Overrides Button2Text when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'en'.
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'de'.
Mettre a jour macOS sur Mac
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'es'.
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'pt'.
Overrides InfoButtonText when the resolved language is 'ja'.
**Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Markdown-formatted text displayed in the dialog.
**Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
**Hinweis:** Ihr Mac laeuft seit **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Starten Sie ihn fuer zuverlaessigere Ergebnisse bitte manuell neu.
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
**Note :** Votre Mac est allume depuis **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Redemarrez-le manuellement pour de meilleurs resultats.
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
**Nota:** Su Mac lleva **{uptimeHumanReadable}** encendido. Para obtener resultados más fiables, reíniícielo manualmente antes de continuar.
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
**Nota:** O seu Mac está ligado há **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Para resultados mais fiáveis, reinicie-o manualmente antes de continuar.
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
**注意:** このMacは **{uptimeHumanReadable}** の間、再起動されていません。より確実に実行するため、続行前に手動で再起動してください。
Overrides ExcessiveUptimeWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
**Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}.
Markdown-formatted text displayed in the dialog.
**Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}.
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
**Hinweis:** Ihr Mac hat nur **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** frei. Dadurch kann dieses macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} scheitern.
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
**Note :** Votre Mac ne dispose que de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, ce qui peut empecher cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} macOS.
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
**Nota:** Su Mac solo dispone de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, lo que puede impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} de macOS.
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
**Nota:** O seu Mac tem apenas **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** livres, o que pode impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} do macOS.
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
**注意:** このMacの空き容量は **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** しかないため、このmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}を実行できない可能性があります。
Overrides DiskSpaceWarningMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
**Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged (downloaded and ready).
**Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
**Gute Nachricht!** Das macOS-{ddmVersionString}-Update wurde bereits geladen. Die Installation startet schnell, wenn Sie **{button1text}** klicken.
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
**Bonne nouvelle !** La mise a jour macOS {ddmVersionString} est deja telechargee. L'installation sera rapide apres clic sur **{button1text}**.
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
**¡Buenas noticias!** La actualización de macOS {ddmVersionString} ya se ha descargado en su Mac y está lista para instalarse. La instalación será más rápida cuando haga clic en **{button1text}**.
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
**Boas notícias!** A atualização do macOS {ddmVersionString} já foi descarregada para o seu Mac e está pronta para instalar. A instalação será mais rápida quando clicar em **{button1text}**.
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
**お知らせ:** macOS {ddmVersionString} アップデートはすでにこのMacにダウンロードされており、インストールの準備ができています。**{button1text}** をクリックすると、すばやくインストールできます。
Overrides StagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged (preparing).
Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
Ihr Mac laedt bereits erforderliche macOS-Update-Komponenten herunter und bereitet sie vor. Die Installation wird danach schneller sein.
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
Votre Mac a commence a telecharger et preparer les composants requis de mise a jour macOS. L'installation sera ensuite plus rapide.
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Su Mac ha comenzado a descargar y preparar los componentes necesarios de actualización de macOS. La instalación será más rápida cuando finalice la preparación de todos los recursos.
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
O seu Mac começou a descarregar e a preparar os componentes necessários da atualização do macOS. A instalação será mais rápida quando todos os recursos estiverem preparados.
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
このMacでは、必要なmacOSアップデートコンポーネントのダウンロードと準備が進行中です。すべての項目の準備が完了すると、インストールはより短時間で完了します。
Overrides PartiallyStagedUpdateMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending.
Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.
Ihr Mac beginnt in Kuerze mit dem Download des Updates.
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.
Votre Mac commencera bientot a telecharger la mise a jour.
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.
Su Mac comenzará a descargar la actualización en breve.
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.
O seu Mac irá começar a descarregar a atualização em breve.
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.
このMacはまもなくアップデートのダウンロードを開始します。
Overrides PendingDownloadMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Whether to hide staged update information (e.g., staged/partial/pending messages) in the UI.

**A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} is now available**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog.

**A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} is now available**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'en'.

**Ein erforderliches macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ist jetzt verfuegbar**

Hallo, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Bitte {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} Sie auf macOS **{ddmVersionString}**, damit Ihr Mac sicher bleibt und den organisatorischen Richtlinien entspricht.{updateReadyMessage}

Um die {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} jetzt durchzufuehren, klicken Sie auf **{button1text}**, folgen Sie den Anweisungen auf dem Bildschirm und klicken Sie dann auf **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Wenn Sie diese {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} jetzt nicht durchfuehren koennen, klicken Sie auf **{button2text}**, um spaeter erneut erinnert zu werden (diese Option wird deaktiviert, wenn die Frist unmittelbar bevorsteht).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'de'.

**Une {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} macOS requise est maintenant disponible**

Bonjour, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Veuillez effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} vers macOS **{ddmVersionString}** afin de maintenir la securite et la conformite de votre Mac aux politiques de votre organisation.{updateReadyMessage}

Pour effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button1text}**, suivez les instructions a l'ecran, puis cliquez sur **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si vous ne pouvez pas effectuer cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button2text}** pour recevoir un nouveau rappel plus tard (ce bouton est desactive lorsque l'echeance est imminente).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'fr'.

**Ya está disponible una {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} obligatoria de macOS**

¡Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Realice la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} a macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para mantener su Mac seguro y en cumplimiento con las políticas de la organización.{updateReadyMessage}

Para realizar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ahora, haga clic en **{button1text}**, revise las instrucciones en pantalla y luego haga clic en **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si no puede realizar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ahora, haga clic en **{button2text}** para recibir otro recordatorio más tarde (esta opción se desactiva cuando se acerca la fecha límite).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'es'.

**Já está disponível uma {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} obrigatória do macOS**

Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Efetue a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} para o macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para manter o seu Mac seguro e em conformidade com as políticas da organização.{updateReadyMessage}

Para efetuar a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} agora, clique em **{button1text}**, siga as instruções no ecrã e depois clique em **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Se não puder efetuar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} agora, clique em **{button2text}** para receber outro lembrete mais tarde (esta opção fica desativada quando o prazo se aproxima).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'pt'.

**必須のmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}を利用できます**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

Macを安全に保ち、組織のポリシーに準拠するため、macOS **{ddmVersionString}** へ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}してください。{updateReadyMessage}

今すぐ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} するには、**{button1text}** をクリックし、画面の案内を確認したあと **{softwareUpdateButtonText}** をクリックしてください。

今すぐ実行できない場合は、**{button2text}** をクリックして後で再通知を受けてください（期限が近づくとこのオプションは無効になります）。

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Overrides Message when the resolved language is 'ja'.

**Current:** macOS {installedmacOSVersion}

**Required:** macOS {ddmVersionString}

**Deadline:** {infoboxDeadlineDisplay}

**Day(s) Remaining:** {infoboxDaysRemainingDisplay}

**Last Restart:** {infoboxLastRestartDisplay}

**Free Disk Space:** {diskSpaceHumanReadable}
Markdown-formatted info box content showing current and required versions and deadline.

For assistance, please contact: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telephone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge Base Article:** {supportKBURL}

**User Information:**
- **Full Name:** {userfullname}
- **User Name:** {username}

**Computer Information:**
- **Computer Name:** {computername}
- **Serial Number:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Script Information:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Markdown-formatted help text including support, user, and computer information.

For assistance, please contact: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telephone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge Base Article:** {supportKBURL}

**User Information:**
- **Full Name:** {userfullname}
- **User Name:** {username}

**Computer Information:**
- **Computer Name:** {computername}
- **Serial Number:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Script Information:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'en'.

Bei Fragen wenden Sie sich bitte an: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefon:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **E-Mail:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Webseite:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge-Base-Artikel:** {supportKBURL}

**Benutzerinformationen:**
- **Vollstaendiger Name:** {userfullname}
- **Benutzername:** {username}

**Computerinformationen:**
- **Computername:** {computername}
- **Seriennummer:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Skriptinformationen:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Skript:** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'de'.

Pour obtenir de l'aide, veuillez contacter : **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telephone :** {supportTeamPhone}
- **E-mail :** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Site web :** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Article de la base de connaissances :** {supportKBURL}

**Informations utilisateur :**
- **Nom complet :** {userfullname}
- **Nom d'utilisateur :** {username}

**Informations de l'ordinateur :**
- **Nom de l'ordinateur :** {computername}
- **Numero de serie :** {serialnumber}
- **macOS :** {osversion}

**Informations du script :**
- **Dialog :** {dialogVersion}
- **Script :** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'fr'.

Para obtener ayuda, contacte con: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Teléfono:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Correo electrónico:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Sitio web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Artículo de la base de conocimiento:** {supportKBURL}

**Información del usuario:**
- **Nombre completo:** {userfullname}
- **Nombre de usuario:** {username}

**Información del ordenador:**
- **Nombre del ordenador:** {computername}
- **Número de serie:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Información del script:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'es'.

Para obter assistência, contacte: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Site web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Artigo da base de conhecimento:** {supportKBURL}

**Informações do utilizador:**
- **Nome completo:** {userfullname}
- **Nome de utilizador:** {username}

**Informações do computador:**
- **Nome do computador:** {computername}
- **Número de série:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Informações do script:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'pt'.

サポートが必要な場合は次までご連絡ください: **{supportTeamName}**
- **電話:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **メール:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Webサイト:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **ナレッジベース記事:** {supportKBURL}

**ユーザー情報:**
- **氏名:** {userfullname}
- **ユーザー名:** {username}

**コンピュータ情報:**
- **コンピュータ名:** {computername}
- **シリアル番号:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**スクリプト情報:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Overrides HelpMessage when the resolved language is 'ja'.
Help image configuration, such as QR code pointing to the info button action.
